title: (Bullish Signal) MLAB, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 49 similar cases, and 41 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 84%. Current price $273.27 is above $271.76 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 11/03/20 - 12/04/20, the price experienced a +3% Uptrend, while the week of 11/27/20 - 12/04/20 shows a -1% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/6emn8v0cbs361.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=814617116c0729c8b7a8f8965cefac947859c34a

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 43 of 52 cases where MLAB's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The 50-day Moving Average for MLAB moved above the 200-day moving average on September 18, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +1.66% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where MLAB advanced for three days, in 271 of 362 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 176 of 238 cases where MLAB Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 74%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8150071-mesa-laboratories-s-mlab-271-85-price-moved-above-its-50-day-moving-average-on-december-04-2020?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
